历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the lowest rankings for the science group were approximately 15,640, 18,973, 23,010, 25,930, and 21,608 respectively. Overall, there was a fluctuating backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 10,290 places from 2021 to 2024. In 2025, there was a clear rebound forward (moving forward by 4,322 places compared to 2024), indicating a recovery in application popularity. The university's planned enrollment in the Inner Mongolia science group was 18–19 students from 2021 to 2024, and 19 students in 2025. In 2026, the plan is 20 students, an increase of 1 student compared to 2025 (an expansion of about 5.3%), which is a small expansion and has limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Yanbian University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its Soft Science ranking has continuously risen from 198th in 2021 to 157th in 2026, indicating steady improvement in comprehensive strength and brand recognition, enhancing its appeal to candidates. The university's reputation has been stable in recent years, with no significant negative public opinion or enrollment gaps. Its Douyin popularity ranks 79th (rated as 'average'), with medium-to-low exposure on short video platforms, not significantly boosting application popularity. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Yanbian University had no disciplines rated A- or above, and disciplines such as clinical medicine and pharmacy lack evaluation data support, limiting appeal to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Among related science majors, clinical medicine is highly recommended, electronic information/communication is highly recommended, mechanical/intelligent manufacturing is recommended with caution, nursing is recommended, and chemistry/pharmacy (biochemical environmental materials) are clearly discouraged. In 2026, the estimated number of physics category candidates in Inner Mongolia is about 110,800 (+32.3%), significantly intensifying competition. Yanbian University is located in Jilin Province, a northeastern university, and recruits across provinces in Inner Mongolia. The university's science enrollment in Inner Mongolia is about 20 students, with average regional preference and no significant additive effect.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the rebound and forward trend in 2025 rankings, the small expansion in 2026 (slightly easing competition), the significant increase in physics category candidates in Inner Mongolia (intensifying competition), and the continuous rise in university rankings, the predicted lowest ranking for the 2026 science group is approximately 21,791, with a range of 21,291–22,291.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the liberal arts group were approximately 4625, 4690, 6374, 5607, and 18943 respectively. From 2021 to 2024, the overall range fluctuated between 4600 and 6400. In 2025, due to the addition of a Korean ethnic special group (minimum ranking 18943), the school's admission line shifted significantly backward; after excluding the special group, the minimum ranking for the regular group was about 4584, consistent with the 2021–2024 levels. The enrollment plan for the liberal arts group in Inner Mongolia was 16–17 students from 2021 to 2024, increased to 23 in 2025 (including the Korean ethnic special group). The 2026 plan is 22 students, a decrease of 1 student (approximately 4.3% reduction) compared to 2025, and the 2026 plan has canceled the Korean ethnic special group, with the actual change in regular admission slots being minimal.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: The school's reputation has been stable in recent years, with no significant negative public opinion or admission gaps. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 79th (rated as 'average'), indicating moderate to low attention on short video platforms, without a notable boost in application enthusiasm. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Yanbian University had no records of A- or above disciplines, with advantageous disciplines mainly concentrated in Korean language, foreign language and literature, and other specialized directions, limiting its national appeal. Yanbian University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university. Its Soft Science Chinese university ranking has been steadily rising, from 198th in 2021 to 157th in 2026, reflecting continuous improvement in comprehensive strength and recognition.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Among related liberal arts majors, law is polarized and wait-and-see, Chinese language and literature is hot and recommended, economics is polarized and wait-and-see, and foreign languages are average and wait-and-see. In 2026, the total number of examinees in Inner Mongolia is about 154,000, a significant increase from 2025. Based on historical proportions, the estimated number of history category examinees is about 43,200 (+32.3%), indicating intensified competition. Yanbian University is located in Yanbian Prefecture, Jilin Province, belonging to the Northeast region, and is a cross-provincial enrollment in Inner Mongolia. The school's enrollment scale in Inner Mongolia is small (over 20 students), and local examinees have average regional preference for it, with no significant regional bonus or penalty effect.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the cancellation of the Korean ethnic special group in 2025, which will significantly shift the admission line forward, the slight reduction in the 2026 plan, the significant increase in the total number of Inner Mongolia examinees (intensified competition), and the steady improvement in the school's ranking, the predicted minimum ranking for the liberal arts group in 2026 is about 16,604, with a range of 16,104 to 17,104.

prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 延边大学是国家211工程重点建设高校、双一流建设高校，位于吉林省延边朝鲜族自治州。作为综合类大学，其医学学科在区域内具有一定影响力，临床医学专业办学历史悠久， 是考生报考的热门选择。211和双一流的标签为毕业生在就业和深造中提供一定优势。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业历来是高考报考的热门方向，临床医学尤其受到高分考生青睐。延边大学地处东北地区，对内蒙古考生而言地理位置适中，且该校医学类在内蒙古招生规模较小（202 6年仅8人），名额稀缺进一步加剧竞争。护理学因选科要求（再选生物）与临床医学、药学类（再选化学）不同，形成独立竞争赛道，位次相对较低。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合M3供需弹性模型计算与近年医学热度回升趋势，预测延边大学2026年在内蒙古自治区医学类最低录取位次约为19967名，较2025年进一步收紧。预计录取位次大概率落在1946 7名至20467名之间，建议位次在此区间内的考生积极报考。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Yanbian University's medical category in Inner Mongolia Autonomous Region over the past five years are: 2021: 13753 (planned 5 students), 2022: 10732 (planned 5 students), 2023: 23010 (planned 9 students), 2024: 25930 (planned 9 students), 2025: 21608 (planned 9 students). After expanding to 9 students in 2023, the ranking dropped significantly, continued to decline to 25930 in 2024, but rebounded strongly to 21608 in 2025 with the same plan, indicating a recovery in medical application popularity. In 2026, the total medical enrollment plan is reduced to 8 students (a decrease of 1 student, about 11.1%), including 4 in Nursing, 2 in Clinical Medicine, and 2 in Pharmacy, and the reduction in enrollment will further intensify competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Yanbian University is a national key university under the 211 Project and a Double First-Class construction university, located in Yanbian Korean Autonomous Prefecture, Jilin Province. As a comprehensive university, its medical disciplines have a certain influence in the region, and the Clinical Medicine program has a long history, making it a popular choice for applicants. The 211 and Double First-Class labels provide certain advantages for graduates in employment and further studies.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Medical majors have always been a popular direction for college entrance exams, with Clinical Medicine particularly favored by high-scoring candidates. Yanbian University is located in Northeast China, which is moderately geographically convenient for Inner Mongolian candidates, and its medical enrollment in Inner Mongolia is small (only 8 students in 2026), with scarce slots further intensifying competition. Nursing, due to different subject requirements (re-selection of Biology) compared to Clinical Medicine and Pharmacy (re-selection of Chemistry), forms an independent competitive track with relatively lower rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the comprehensive M3 supply-demand elasticity model calculation and the recent recovery trend in medical popularity, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Yanbian University's medical category in Inner Mongolia Autonomous Region in 2026 will be approximately 19967, further tightening compared to 2025. The expected admission ranking is likely to fall between 19467 and 20467. Candidates within this ranking range are advised to actively apply.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Pharmacy as the main target, aim for Tier 1 Clinical Medicine as a stretch, and use Tier 3 Nursing as a safety option.
